title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: A compilation of crime stories that depict the gripping real life incidents and sheds light on the victim's battle for justice.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: Chandana marries into a family with a troubled past in order to escape her fate. However, can she restore the family's hope?

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva quells the cruelty of Tarakasura's sons, ending their lives with his powerful Pashupatastra. However, another Asura, unable to bear this defeat, launches an attack on Lord Shiva in retaliation.

subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Yajamana
subTitle: A delivery boy, who is burdened with family responsibilities, gets into a contract marriage with Jhansi, a rich woman who despises men.

subTitle: Raju, a focused engineering student, is thrown into the real world, where he must confront practical challenges and life lessons that teach him valuable truths beyond textbooks and academics.

title: Pavada Purusha
subTitle: Sundara and Mayappa discover Balu perched atop a lofty tree branch. Despite their pleas, Balu refuses to come down, prompting a frustrated Sundara to sternly promise discipline.
